paper.title: Flying far and fast: the distribution of distant hypervelocity star candidates from Gaia DR2 data

extraction.summary: 论文利用Gaia DR2搜索银心距>30 kpc的遥远HVS候选体。从15,681个远距离源中选出174个V_gc>500 km/s的最佳样本。速度均为ETW偏差下限。部分候选体速度达2000 km/s，可能具河外起源。共提取22颗。

method_chain.summary: Gaia DR2: 87.7M sources. Selected 4.83M with complete astrometry+RV. 15,681 with r_gc > 30 kpc.
Galactic rest-frame velocities. No global parallax zero-point correction.
MC sampling for uncertainty propagation. Best sample: 174 stars with V_gc > 500 km/s.
HVS candidates at r_gc > 30 kpc, V_gc > 500 km/s (lower limits due to ETW bias). Up to 2000 km/s.

inclusion_assessment.summary: Best HVS candidate (parallax rel err < 0.5). r_gc > 30 kpc, V_gc > 500 km/s.
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: Explicitly listed in paper's HVS candidate table.
